name: JumpCloud
description: Monitor JumpCloud users, MFA enrollment, and managed systems for identity and device compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to JumpCloud Admin Console
2. Click your account name (bottom-left) and select 'My API Key'
3. Note: API access must be enabled by an Admin with Billing role. If you see 'You don't have permission', contact your Billing Admin.
4. Click 'Generate New API Key' if needed
5. Copy the API key and paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in JumpCloud Admin Console > API Settings

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews JumpCloud users for employee access management

checks.name: 2FA
checks.description: Verifies that JumpCloud users have TOTP MFA enrolled

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Verifies all JumpCloud-managed devices have full disk encryption enabled and reports OS version

checks.name: OS Version & Patching
checks.description: Verifies OS versions across managed devices and lists applied patches (Windows). Requires JumpCloud System Insights to be enabled.
